text:
KnowledgeWork IsTwoSelf-Optimising Loops
py aou apmuy asnnud uoo adoad aw < spoo aag < asnpuy o rapiy < apmy a y 1. THE T0OL L0OP
Writing, archives, written cultures Oral / early scribes Alexandria catalogues Pinakes / Scriptoria, copying, 国園 Monasteries preservation Indexes, bibliographies, Early modern / industrial age filing systems Late 19th century Dewey + universal bibliography a associative 回盟 Memex/ indexing 1945 Web → AI era Search engines, AI systems ranking,
More knowledge work →> one expert cannot do everything →> tasks are decomposed →> specialist roles appear → experts supervise higher-leverage work →→ more knowledge work 2. THE ORGANISATION LOOP Each new tool makes some kind ofknowledge work cheaper.
gathers, interprets, Lone expert One person records Scribes & clerks record-keeping Thinking and separate Monastic scriptoria Copying, correcting. organised labour storing.berore Universities / guilds / Training, ranking, credentialing professions institutional memory Bureaucracies procedures, Files, forms, Partner associate - 8888 analyst -> assistant services firms Professional Judgmentvs research, documents, process Paralegals / assistants
Organisation changes who does what in knowledge work.
